meta.question: In "Dynamic Power Analaysis", open the "05 Simulation Configuraitons" package and list participating configurations.
meta.finalAnswer:
In the "Dynamic Power Analysis" package, under "05 Simulation Configurations", there are 3 participating simulation configurations:

1. **APS Power Roll-up Online**
2. **APS Power Roll-up Standby**
3. **APS Satisfy Peak Power Analysis**

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Dynamic Power Analaysis"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Dynamic Power"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Dynamic"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::10%2520Analysis::Roll-up%2520Analyses::Dynamic%2520Power%2520Analysis> ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::10%2520Analysis::Roll-up%2520Analyses::Dynamic%2520Power%2520Analysis> ?p ?o .
  ?o rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {

  ?elem rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/simulation%20configuration> .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::10%20Analysis::Roll-up%20Analyses::Dynamic%20Power%20Analysis::05%20Simulation%20Configurations> vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .

  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::10%2520Analysis::Roll-up%2520Analyses::Dynamic%2520Power%2520Analysis::05%2520Simulation%2520Configurations> vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/simulation%20configuration> .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/simulation%20configuration> .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "Dynamic%20Power%20Analysis::05%20Simulation%20Configurations"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?qn WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/simulation%20configuration> .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "Dynamic%20Power%20Analysis::05%20Simulation%20Configurations"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found the 3 simulation configurations in the "05 Simulation Configurations" package under "Dynamic Power Analysis". The query successfully retrieved all simulation configuration elements by filtering on qualified name containing the package path.

request.answer:
In the "Dynamic Power Analysis" package, under "05 Simulation Configurations", there are 3 participating simulation configurations:

1. **APS Power Roll-up Online**
2. **APS Power Roll-up Standby**
3. **APS Satisfy Peak Power Analysis**
